name.motionImage.description: Character image input in Motion Control

name.motionVideo.description: Reference video input in Motion Control

description.motionImage.message: Upload a character reference image; elements like character and background in the generated video will reference this.

description.motionVideo.message: Upload a motion reference video; the character's actions in the generated video will match this video (MP4 / MOV, ≤1 minute, ≤1 GB).

description.motionPrompt.message: Optional. Can include positive and negative descriptions to assist in generating effects.

description.characterOrientation.message: Choosing 'Follow Video' yields better performance for complex actions; choosing 'Follow Image' aligns character orientation with the reference image, improving camera movement.

description.motionMode.message: std prioritizes performance, pro prioritizes quality.

description.keepOriginalSound.message: When enabled, retains the original audio from the reference video; when disabled, the output video does not include the original audio.

placeholder.motionPrompt.message: For example: A person is jumping. Optional.

message.motionMissingInputs.message: Please upload both the character image and motion reference video.
message.motionMissingInputs.description: Prompt when inputs are missing in Motion Control

inspiration.openButton.description: Button to open the Inspiration drawer

inspiration.removeChip.description: Button aria-label to remove selected preset in the prompt area

inspiration.hint.message: Click a phrase to automatically add it to the prompt; click again to remove it.
inspiration.hint.description: Usage instructions at the top of the Inspiration drawer

inspiration.empty.description: Empty state of the Inspiration drawer

inspiration.clearSelected.description: Button to clear all selected presets

inspiration.chip.shotShallowDof.description: Text indicating a photography effect that blurs the background while keeping the subject in focus.

name.type.description: 要生成的 Kling视频的内容类型，如'链接'、'文本'等

name.modePro.description: Kling视频的高品质模式（输出 1080p）

name.mode4k.description: Kling 4K 模式（仅 v3 / v3-Omni 支持）

name.cameraTypeSimple.description: 使用自定义六维度参数

name.createdAt.description: 生成 Kling 视频的日期和时间

name.cfgScale.description: 生成视频的自由度参数（0-1），值越大越贴近参考（英文建议：Freedom Level）

name.generateAudio.description: 是否同步生成音效，支持 kling-v3、kling-v3-omni 和 kling-v2-6（pro 模式）

name.startImage.description: 表单字段标签：首帧参考图（英文建议翻译为“First Frame”，保持简短避免遮挡按钮）

name.negativePrompt.description: 生成视频的负向文本提示

name.endImage.description: 表单字段标签：尾帧参考图（英文建议翻译为“Last Frame”，保持简短避免遮挡按钮）

name.ingredients.description: 多图创建视频开关/标签（英文建议：Multi-Image，保持简短）

name.model.description: The model version used to generate the video

name.ratio.description: Video ratio used for generating the video

name.mode.description: Mode used for generating the video

name.effect.description: Name of style parameter for switching between different model versions or styles

name.ingredientsModel.description: Model version used for generating the video

name.klingBot.description: Name of the Kling video generator

description.ingredients.message: Enable this to upload multiple images for generating your own video.

description.imageUrl.message: For multi-image video tasks, multiple images must be uploaded.

description.negativePrompt.message: Optional negative prompt text, max 200 characters

description.uploadStartImage.message: Upload the first frame as reference; the final video will use it as a guide.

description.uploadEndImage.message: Upload the last frame as reference; the final video will use it as a guide.

description.cfgScale.message: Degree of freedom for video generation, optional [0,1]. Higher values increase correlation.

description.mode.message: std: better performance, pro: higher quality; 4K only supports v3 / v3-Omni and cannot be combined with camera control

description.mode4kIncompatibleCamera.message: Camera control is enabled; cannot use 4K simultaneously
description.mode4kIncompatibleCamera.description: Reason 4K option is disabled (camera control set)

description.duration.message: Standard models support 5/10 sec; v3 / v3-Omni supports 3/5/8/10/12/15 sec

description.generateAudio.message: Generate audio with video. Supported by kling-v3 / kling-v3-omni / kling-v2-6 (pro mode) only

description.generateAudioUnsupported.message: Current model does not support audio; only kling-v3 / kling-v3-omni / kling-v2-6 (pro mode) available

description.cameraControl.message: Control camera movement. Choose 'Custom' to fine-tune 6 axes, values in [-1,1]

description.cameraControlDisabled4k.message: Camera control unavailable in 4K mode. Switch to std/pro to enable

description.cameraControlDisabledImage2V.message: Camera control not supported when first-frame reference is uploaded. Remove reference to enable

description.cameraControlNotSupported.message: Current model/mode/duration does not support camera control. Adjust settings first

placeholder.prompt.message: Enter prompt for video style, e.g., moving

placeholder.negativePrompt.message: Enter negative prompt for video style, max 200 chars

button.precise.description: Button text to generate Kling video

button.creative.description: Button text to generate Kling video

button.generate.description: Button text to generate Kling video

button.uploadImageUrl.description: Button text to upload image (simplified as 'Upload')

message.uploadReferencesExceed.message: You can upload up to 1 image
message.uploadReferencesExceed.description: Error message when uploaded images exceed the limit

message.uploadReferencesSuccess.description: Success message when image upload succeeds

message.uploadReferencesError.description: Error message when image upload fails

message.endImageRequiresStart.message: Please upload the starting frame before using the end frame reference
message.endImageRequiresStart.description: Error shown when only the end frame is uploaded without a start frame

message.endImageNotSupported.message: End frame reference is not supported by the current model/mode/duration. Please adjust settings (common: mode pro, duration 5s).
message.endImageNotSupported.description: Prompt when the end frame is not supported by the current model

message.featureNotSupportedTitle.description: Title of the confirmation dialog when switching options may remove settings

message.featureNotSupportedBody.message: The following enabled settings are not supported with the current selection: {fields}. Continuing will clear these settings.
message.featureNotSupportedBody.description: Message when switching model/mode/duration will remove incompatible settings, {fields} replaced by field names

message.featureRemovedNotice.description: Toast notice after user confirms switching

button.confirmContinue.description: Primary button on feature removal confirmation dialog

button.cancelSwitch.description: Cancel button on feature removal confirmation dialog

message.startingTask.description: Message shown when a drawing task begins

message.startTaskSuccess.description: Success message when task starts successfully

message.startTaskFailed.message: Failed to start task, please contact admin
message.startTaskFailed.description: Error message when starting a drawing task fails

message.usedUp.message: You have used up your credits. Please purchase more to continue
message.usedUp.description: Message shown when credits are depleted

message.generating.description: Message while the image/video is being generated

message.uploadVideoExceed.message: Number of starting frame images exceeds the limit
message.uploadVideoExceed.description: Error when starting frame upload exceeds limit

message.uploadVideoTypeFailed.description: Error shown when uploaded file is not MP4

message.uploadStartImageExceed.message: Number of starting frame images exceeds the limit
message.uploadStartImageExceed.description: Error when starting frame upload exceeds limit

message.uploadEndImageExceed.message: Number of end frame images exceeds the limit
message.uploadEndImageExceed.description: Error when end frame upload exceeds limit

message.uploadStartImageError.description: Error when starting frame upload fails

message.uploadEndImageError.description: Error when end frame upload fails

message.noOperations.description: Message when no actions are available

message.noTasks.message: No history yet. Click Generate Video on the left
message.noTasks.description: Message shown when there are no tasks
